layers.name: Public API
layers.summary: The Gson facade, GsonBuilder, the TypeAdapter/TypeAdapterFactory SPI, and configuration policies (naming, exclusion, number, strictness) that form the library's public surface.

classes.name: ExclusionStrategy
classes.description_zh: 字段/类排除策略 SPI,决定哪些字段或类型在序列化与反序列化时被跳过。
classes.description_en: Pluggable strategy that decides which fields or classes are skipped during serialization and deserialization.

classes.name: Gson
classes.description_zh: Gson 库的核心门面,暴露 toJson/fromJson 入口,持有类型适配器工厂链并按类型解析出对应的 TypeAdapter。
classes.description_en: The library's central facade — exposes toJson/fromJson and resolves a TypeAdapter for any type by walking its ordered factory chain.

classes.name: GsonBuilder
classes.description_zh: Gson 实例的流式构建器,注册自定义适配器、命名与排除策略等配置后组装出不可变的 Gson。
classes.description_en: Fluent builder that registers custom adapters, naming/exclusion policies and other options, then assembles an immutable Gson instance.

classes.name: JsonDeserializer
classes.description_zh: 自定义反序列化 SPI:用户实现它把 JsonElement 树还原为某类型。
classes.description_en: User-facing SPI for custom deserialization — turns a JsonElement tree back into a given type.

classes.name: JsonIOException
classes.description_zh: 表示读写 JSON 过程中发生底层 I/O 错误的异常。
classes.description_en: Thrown when a low-level I/O error occurs while reading or writing JSON.

classes.name: JsonParseException
classes.description_zh: JSON 解析相关异常的基类,涵盖语法错误与 I/O 错误两个子类。
classes.description_en: Base type for JSON parsing errors, specialized by the syntax-error and I/O-error subclasses.

classes.name: JsonSerializer
classes.description_zh: 自定义序列化 SPI:用户实现它把某类型转换为 JsonElement 树。
classes.description_en: User-facing SPI for custom serialization — converts a given type into a JsonElement tree.

classes.name: JsonSyntaxException
classes.description_zh: 表示被解析的 JSON 文本结构非法、不符合 JSON 语法的异常。
classes.description_en: Thrown when the JSON being parsed is structurally malformed and violates JSON syntax.

classes.name: TypeAdapter
classes.description_zh: 所有类型转换的抽象基类,定义将单一类型在 Java 对象与 JSON 流之间读写(read/write)的契约。
classes.description_en: Abstract base for every type conversion — defines the read/write contract that streams a single Java type to and from JSON.

classes.name: TypeAdapterFactory
classes.description_zh: 类型适配器工厂 SPI,按类型惰性创建 TypeAdapter,是 Gson 可扩展适配器链的基本单元。
classes.description_en: The factory SPI that lazily creates a TypeAdapter for a given type — the pluggable unit of Gson's adapter chain.

layers.name: JSON Tree Model
layers.summary: The in-memory JSON DOM — JsonElement and its JsonObject/JsonArray/JsonPrimitive/JsonNull subtypes — plus the parsers that build it.

classes.name: JsonArray
classes.description_zh: JSON 数组节点,按序持有一组 JsonElement 元素。
classes.description_en: A JSON array node holding an ordered list of JsonElement values.

classes.name: JsonElement
classes.description_zh: JSON 树模型的抽象根,代表内存中的一个 JSON 节点,并提供向对象/数组/原始值/Null 等具体类型转换的便捷方法。
classes.description_en: Abstract root of the in-memory JSON tree — one JSON node with convenience accessors to its concrete object/array/primitive/null forms.

classes.name: JsonNull
classes.description_zh: 代表 JSON null 字面量的单例节点。
classes.description_en: Singleton node representing the JSON null literal.

classes.name: JsonObject
classes.description_zh: JSON 对象节点,以有序的成员名→JsonElement 映射(基于 LinkedTreeMap)表示。
classes.description_en: A JSON object node — an ordered map of member names to JsonElement values backed by LinkedTreeMap.

classes.name: JsonParser
classes.description_zh: 将 JSON 文本或流解析为 JsonElement 树的静态入口。
classes.description_en: Static entry point that parses JSON text or a stream into a JsonElement tree.

classes.name: JsonPrimitive
classes.description_zh: JSON 原始值节点,封装布尔、数字或字符串,并对数字做惰性解析。
classes.description_en: A JSON primitive node wrapping a boolean, number or string, with lazy numeric parsing.

layers.name: Type Adapters (Binding)
layers.summary: The serialization/deserialization engine: built-in and reflective TypeAdapters that bind Java objects to and from JSON tokens, including the @JsonAdapter and tree adapters.

classes.name: CollectionTypeAdapterFactory
classes.description_zh: 为 Collection 类型生成适配器,递归读写其元素。
classes.description_en: Builds adapters for Collection types, reading and writing their elements recursively.

classes.name: JsonAdapterAnnotationTypeAdapterFactory
classes.description_zh: 识别 @JsonAdapter 注解并改用其指定的适配器,实现声明式适配器绑定。
classes.description_en: Honors the @JsonAdapter annotation by substituting the adapter it names — declarative adapter binding.

classes.name: JsonTreeReader
classes.description_zh: 把已构建的 JsonElement 树当作 JsonReader 来遍历,桥接树模型与流式适配器。
classes.description_en: Presents an in-memory JsonElement tree as a JsonReader, bridging the tree model to streaming adapters.

classes.name: JsonTreeWriter
classes.description_zh: 一个把写入的 token 收集成 JsonElement 树的 JsonWriter,桥接流式适配器与树模型。
classes.description_en: A JsonWriter that collects emitted tokens into a JsonElement tree, bridging streaming adapters to the tree model.

classes.name: MapTypeAdapterFactory
classes.description_zh: 为 Map 类型生成适配器,处理键的序列化策略与值的递归转换。
classes.description_en: Builds adapters for Map types, handling key serialization policy and recursive value conversion.

classes.name: ObjectTypeAdapter
classes.description_zh: 当目标类型为 Object 时使用的适配器,将任意 JSON 反序列化为 Map/List/原始值。
classes.description_en: Adapter used when the target type is Object — deserializes arbitrary JSON into Maps, Lists and primitives.

classes.name: ReflectiveTypeAdapterFactory
classes.description_zh: 面向任意 POJO 的反射式适配器工厂,按字段反射读写,是 Gson 处理普通对象的默认引擎。
classes.description_en: Reflection-based adapter factory for arbitrary POJOs — binds JSON to fields via reflection, Gson's default engine for plain objects.

classes.name: TreeTypeAdapter
classes.description_zh: 把用户的 JsonSerializer/JsonDeserializer 适配为 TypeAdapter,经由 JsonElement 树完成转换。
classes.description_en: Adapts user JsonSerializer/JsonDeserializer pairs into a TypeAdapter, converting through the JsonElement tree.

classes.name: TypeAdapterRuntimeTypeWrapper
classes.description_zh: 序列化时按值的运行时类型(而非声明类型)选择委托适配器的包装器,正确处理多态字段。
classes.description_en: Wraps an adapter to pick the delegate by a value's runtime type rather than its declared type, handling polymorphic fields.

classes.name: TypeAdapters
classes.description_zh: 内置类型适配器及其工厂的注册表,提供基本类型、字符串、日期、JsonElement 等的标准适配器。
classes.description_en: Registry of Gson's built-in TypeAdapters and their factories — primitives, strings, dates, JsonElement and more.

layers.name: Streaming I/O
layers.summary: The low-level pull-based token layer: JsonReader parses and JsonWriter emits JSON one token at a time, with scope tracking and lenient/strict modes.

classes.name: JsonReader
classes.description_zh: 基于拉取的流式 JSON 解析器,逐个产出 token,支持宽松/严格模式与作用域跟踪。
classes.description_en: Pull-based streaming JSON parser that yields one token at a time, with lenient/strict modes and scope tracking.

classes.name: JsonWriter
classes.description_zh: 流式 JSON 生成器,逐个写出 token,管理嵌套作用域与格式化样式。
classes.description_en: Streaming JSON generator that emits one token at a time, managing nested scopes and formatting style.

layers.name: Reflection & Type Tokens
layers.summary: Generic type capture via TypeToken and reflective field/constructor access used to map Java types onto JSON.

classes.name: TypeToken
classes.description_zh: 通过匿名子类捕获完整泛型类型以绕过类型擦除,作为查找适配器的键。
classes.description_en: Captures a full generic type via an anonymous subclass (defeating erasure), serving as the key for adapter lookup.

layers.name: Annotations
layers.summary: Declarative annotations (@SerializedName, @Expose, @JsonAdapter, @Since/@Until) that customize how fields are bound.

classes.name: SerializedName
classes.description_zh: 指定字段在 JSON 中使用的名称(及可选备用名),覆盖默认命名策略。
classes.description_en: Specifies the JSON name (and optional alternates) for a field, overriding the default naming policy.

classes.name: Expose
classes.description_zh: 标记字段是否参与序列化/反序列化,配合 GsonBuilder.excludeFieldsWithoutExposeAnnotation 使用。
classes.description_en: Marks whether a field is exposed to serialization/deserialization, used with excludeFieldsWithoutExposeAnnotation.

classes.name: JsonAdapter
classes.description_zh: 在类型或字段上就地声明要使用的 TypeAdapter/工厂,实现声明式适配器绑定。
classes.description_en: Declares the TypeAdapter/factory to use directly on a type or field for in-place adapter binding.

classes.name: Since
classes.description_zh: 标注成员自哪个版本起存在,配合 GsonBuilder.setVersion 做版本化排除。
classes.description_en: Marks the version a member was introduced in, enabling version-based exclusion via GsonBuilder.setVersion.

classes.name: Until
classes.description_zh: 标注成员到哪个版本为止存在,配合 GsonBuilder.setVersion 做版本化排除。
classes.description_en: Marks the version a member is present until, enabling version-based exclusion via GsonBuilder.setVersion.

layers.name: Internal Runtime
layers.summary: Internal support — object construction, field exclusion, generic-type utilities, the LinkedTreeMap, primitive/number helpers, and SQL date/time adapters.

classes.name: ConstructorConstructor
classes.description_zh: 为目标类型查找实例化方式(无参构造器、InstanceCreator 或 Unsafe),反序列化时据此创建实例。
classes.description_en: Resolves how to instantiate a target type (no-args constructor, InstanceCreator or Unsafe) for deserialization.

classes.name: Excluder
classes.description_zh: 依据 @Expose、版本(@Since/@Until)、修饰符与自定义策略决定字段/类是否排除,本身也是一个 TypeAdapterFactory。
classes.description_en: Decides field/class exclusion from @Expose, version (@Since/@Until), modifiers and custom strategies — itself a TypeAdapterFactory.

classes.name: GsonTypes
classes.description_zh: 泛型类型处理的静态工具集(原 $Gson$Types),用于解析、规范化与比较 java.lang.reflect.Type。
classes.description_en: Static utilities for working with generic types (formerly $Gson$Types) — resolving, canonicalizing and comparing reflect.Type.

classes.name: LinkedTreeMap
classes.description_zh: 保持插入顺序的红黑树 Map 实现,作为 JsonObject 与反序列化 Map 的有序底层容器。
classes.description_en: Insertion-order-preserving red-black tree map backing JsonObject and deserialized Maps.

classes.name: ObjectConstructor
classes.description_zh: 构造目标类型默认实例的工厂接口,供反序列化导航对象图时使用。
classes.description_en: Factory interface that constructs a default instance of a type for navigation during deserialization.

classes.name: Streams
classes.description_zh: 在字符流与 JsonElement 解析树之间读写的内部工具。
classes.description_en: Internal helper that reads and writes Gson parse trees over character streams.

flows.name: 序列化(对象 → JSON)
flows.description: Gson.toJson 解析出目标类型的 TypeAdapter,并通过 JsonWriter 逐个写出 JSON token。
flows.description_en: Gson.toJson resolves the type adapter and streams the object out as JSON tokens through JsonWriter.

flows.name: 反序列化(JSON → 对象)
flows.description: Gson.fromJson 用 JsonReader 解析 token 流,经 TypeAdapter 读入并由 ConstructorConstructor 实例化对象。
flows.description_en: Gson.fromJson parses the token stream with JsonReader, reads it through a TypeAdapter and instantiates objects via ConstructorConstructor.

flows.name: 适配器工厂链
flows.description: Gson 按注册顺序遍历 TypeAdapterFactory 链,直到某个工厂为该类型返回 TypeAdapter——Gson 的标志性扩展机制。
flows.description_en: Gson walks its ordered TypeAdapterFactory chain until one returns a TypeAdapter for the type — Gson's signature extension mechanism.

flows.name: 类型适配器读写
flows.description: TypeAdapter 的多态 read/write 策略,由内置适配器分别处理对象、数字、日期、集合、枚举与 JsonElement。
flows.description_en: TypeAdapter's polymorphic read/write strategy, dispatched to built-in adapters for objects, numbers, dates, arrays, enums and JsonElement.

flows.name: JSON 树模型
flows.description: JsonElement 为根的内存 DOM 层级:对象、数组、原始值与 Null,分别由 LinkedTreeMap、列表与惰性数字支撑。
flows.description_en: The in-memory DOM rooted at JsonElement — object, array, primitive and null nodes backed by LinkedTreeMap, lists and lazy numbers.
